json-logger:logger.doc:name: INFO: File received from SFTP for processing
json-logger:logger.message: Product File received from SFTP for processing

json-logger:logger.doc:name: DEBUG: Incoming Payload
INFO: Product file processed from SFTP

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { object: Mule::p('sfdc.product.object'), externalId: Mule::p('sfdc.product.externalId') }

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: Mule::p('api.name'), apiVersion: Mule::p('api.version'), traceId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as DateTime, message: "Success", sfResponse: write(payload,"application/json") } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

json-logger:logger.doc:name: ERROR: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder
json-logger:logger.message: Upsert in salesforce failed. Moving file to failed folder

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ((item, index) -> { FFIITMN: item.ProductCode, FFIARCD: item.IsActive, FFIPCKI: item.Item_Pack__c, FFISZEI: item.Item_size__c, FFIUPCN: item.UPC_Number_case__c, FFIIDE1: item.Name, FFIIDE2: item.Description, FFIWTIW: item.Item_weight__c, FFIWTET: item.Tare_weight__c, FFICWCD: item.Catch_weight_code__c, FFICBEC: item.Case_cube__c, FFIBRDN: item.Item_brand__c, FFIHGTH: item.Height__c, FFIWDTH: item.Width__c, FFIDPTH: item.Depth__c, FFIBNCD: item.Item_brand_code__c, errorMessage: item.errorMessage } filterObject ((value, key, index) -> value != null))
